backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a ContactSubmission type with a mutable list, a public function to validate and store form submissions, and a query function to retrieve all submissions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (design theme, hero section, introduction section, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of every component, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'SNU Technologies Inc. Website' and mounting the app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full page by rendering all section components in order: Navbar, Hero, Introduction, About, Services, CoreTechnologies, Development, Clients, Contact, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Three-card About section with scroll-reveal animation displaying 'About Me', 'Who We Are', and 'Office Location' cards, each with numbered teal/gold accent headers and hover border effects.
frontend/src/components/Clients.tsx: Clients section featuring a heading, an auto-scrolling logo carousel with grayscale-to-color hover transitions, and a four-cell industry trust indicator grid.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a company details panel (address, phone, email), a five-field form wired to the backend submitContactForm mutation with loading/success/error states, and a Google Maps embed.
frontend/src/components/CoreTechnologies: Renders a grid section showcasing seven core technology offerings (e.g., Cyber Security, AI/ML, Cloud) with icons, names, and descriptions, using scroll-reveal animation.
frontend/src/components/Development.tsx: Displays a two-column section promoting SNU's custom software development services, featuring an illustration and four feature pills (Full-Stack Engineering, Modern Frameworks, etc.).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, smooth-scroll navigation links, and contact details (address, phone, email), plus a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, CTA buttons for services and hiring, and a stats row showing placements, clients, and years of experience.
frontend/src/components/Introduction.tsx: Two-column 'Our Mission' section with a headline, descriptive paragraph, four value-pillar checklist items, and an accompanying illustration image.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed responsive navbar that turns opaque on scroll, with smooth-scroll desktop links, a 'Get Started' CTA button, and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: React component rendering the 'Core Services' section with two service cards (Staffing Solutions and Managed IT Services), each featuring an icon, description, highlights list, and a scroll-reveal animation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useSubmitContactForm hook that wraps a React Query mutation to submit contact form data to the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to add a 'revealed' CSS class to a referenced element when it scrolls into view, then stops observing it.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for the dark navy/teal/gold design theme, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, custom utility classes (gradients, glows, circuit background, scroll-reveal animations), and Google Fonts imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy/teal/gold color palettes, Rajdhani/Inter font families, box shadows, and keyframe animations for the SNU Technologies design system.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the SNU Technologies single-page corporate website's architecture, required image assets, and a registry of implemented features with their completion status.
